name: Zero-Confidence Source Material
narrative_summary: A 227-chapter work that returned LLM-unavailable stubs across all volumes, leaving no extractable story design, craft observations, reader rewards, or narrative mechanics. Documented as negative example for distillation pipeline validation.

content_json.recommended_action: Regenerate chapter cards with LLM enabled before volume distillation

name: Chapter-Level Confidence Aggregation Failure
narrative_summary: Demonstrates that aggregated volume cards cannot compensate for chapter-level extraction failure. When individual chapter confidence is 0.0, volume-level aggregation yields empty state_progression, turning_points, setup_payoff_rhythm, and craft_profile objects regardless of volume scope.

content_json.critical_threshold: chapter confidence > 0.0 required for volume aggregation
content_json.observed_breakdown: chapters → volumes → book design all empty

name: Style Safety Assessment Blocked by Content Absence
narrative_summary: Author craft card cannot assess voice patterns, tonal commitments, POV techniques, dialogue systems, or sentence rhythm because no actual narrative content exists in source chapter cards. Style safety policy remains indeterminate.
